data.keyword: professional halotherapy equipment for spa business

result.keyword: professional halotherapy equipment for spa business

items.markdown:
Professional halotherapy (dry salt therapy) equipment for a spa business typically falls into three categories: **halogenerators** (the core salt-particle dispersing machine), **freestanding cabins/booths** , and **multi-modality units** that combine salt therapy with infrared or red light.[[1]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-choose-best-halotherapy-machine#:~:text=Best%20Multipurpose%20Halotherapy%20Machine,therapy%20via%20nine%20programmable%20settings.)[[2]](https://newsandviews.aacvpr.org/Full-Article/halotherapy-a-breath-of-salty-air-1#:~:text=The%20therapy%20uses%20a%20piece,aerosol%20into%20a%20treatment%20space.)[[3]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions:%20A%20Leader%20in,Courtesy%20of%20Halotherapy%20Solutions.)[[4]](https://www.salinityforyou.com/halotherapy#:~:text=How%20It%20%28%20Salt%20Therapy%20%29%20Works,into%20the%20air%20of%20a%20controlled%20space.)[[5]](https://recovathlete.com/collections/halotherapy-solutions)

Professional Halogenerators[[1]](https://prestigewellness.us/salt-experiences/#:~:text=For%20a%20more%20intensive%20therapeutic%20effect%2C%20PWG,clinical-style%20respiratory%20treatments%20and%20luxury%20spa%20experiences.)

The halogenerator is the only essential piece of equipment for dry salt therapy; it grinds pharmaceutical-grade salt into micro-particles and disperses them into the air.[[1]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-choose-best-halotherapy-machine#:~:text=Best%20Multipurpose%20Halotherapy%20Machine,therapy%20via%20nine%20programmable%20settings.)[[2]](https://newsandviews.aacvpr.org/Full-Article/halotherapy-a-breath-of-salty-air-1#:~:text=The%20therapy%20uses%20a%20piece,aerosol%20into%20a%20treatment%20space.)[[3]](https://www.enlightenmovement.com/dry-salt-therapy)

- **SALT FX Pro** : A leading commercial-grade halogenerator from [SALT Chamber](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/salt-fx-pro-halogenerator) designed for rooms up to 450 sq. ft.. It is marketed as one of the quietest and most reliable units on the market.
- **[HaloFX](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:3504973546728682072,headlineOfferDocid:14641830832978133593,productDocid:14641830832978133593&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwilt7-b-6OTAxUQW0EAHfAYArUQxa4PegQIBRAF)** : A widely used halogenerator from [Halotherapy Solutions](https://halotherapysolutions.com/halogenerator-for-salt-rooms/) that includes a lifetime warranty and has been in use for over 13 years.
- **[Iiris-36](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:16083955709040977667,headlineOfferDocid:12082136350928520671,productDocid:12082136350928520671&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwilt7-b-6OTAxUQW0EAHfAYArUQxa4PegQIBRAJ)** : A modern, reliable dry salt aerosol generator often recommended by [The Salt Room Consulting](https://saltroomconstruction.com/product/iiris-36/) for commercial builds.
- **HaloGX Pro** : An advanced, compact halogenerator capable of treating spaces up to 150 sq. ft..[[1]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/about-us/#:~:text=About%20Halotherapy%20Solutions,respiratory%20health%2C%20hygiene%20and%20immunity.)[[2]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/salt-fx-pro-halogenerator#:~:text=We%20are%20proud%20to%20introduce,RH%2C%20700-1060%20hPa.)[[3]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-choose-best-halotherapy-machine#:~:text=Best%20Multipurpose%20Halotherapy%20Machine,therapy%20via%20nine%20programmable%20settings.)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/how-to-choose-best-halotherapy-machine#:~:text=Best%20Halotherapy%20Machine%20for%20Sauna,via%20nine%20easily%20programmable%20settings.)[[5]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/products/halogenerators#:~:text=SALT%20FX%C2%AE%20Pro,the%20lowest%20cost%20of%20entry.)[[6]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/halogenerator-for-salt-rooms/#:~:text=The%20HaloFX%E2%84%A2%20has%20been,backed%20by%20a%20Lifetime%20Warranty.)[[7]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:12082136350928520671&ibp=oshop)[[8]](https://recovathlete.com/collections/halotherapy-solutions)

Freestanding Booths and Cabins[[1]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/halogenerator-for-salt-booths-and-cabins/)[[2]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/salt-rooms-salt-caves/)[[3]](https://recovathlete.com/collections/halotherapy-solutions)

For spas without the space for a dedicated salt room, freestanding units offer a "plug-and-play" alternative that typically installs in under 90 minutes.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10694323843935424057&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15688858498582980868&ibp=oshop)

- **[HaloSTAR Halotherapy Booth](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:16782830647690521193,headlineOfferDocid:10694323843935424057,productDocid:10694323843935424057&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwilt7-b-6OTAxUQW0EAHfAYArUQxa4PegQICRAC)** : A 1–3 person booth featuring high-end cabinetry, backlit salt bricks, and an integrated HaloGX halogenerator.
- **HaloBed** : Designed for private, deep relaxation and focused skin treatments, it allows clients to lay down during the session.
- **HaloPod Mini** : A portable, compact salt room solution designed for flexibility in smaller wellness spaces.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10694323843935424057&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions:%20A%20Leader%20in,Courtesy%20of%20Halotherapy%20Solutions.)[[3]](https://recovathlete.com/collections/halotherapy-solutions)[[4]](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/halostar-halotherapy-booth#:~:text=Bring%20the%20benefits%20of%20halotherapy,halogenerator%E2%80%94optimized%20for%20the%20HaloSTAR.)[[5]](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/halostar-halotherapy-booth)

Multi-Modality Spa Equipment[[1]](https://vipmedispa.com/services/halo-laser-combo-treatment/#:~:text=Your%20HALO%20BroadBand%20Light%20Treatment%20This%20is,a%20multitude%20of%20treatments%20with%20one%20device.)

Many modern spas prioritize equipment that combines halotherapy with other popular treatments to maximize revenue per square foot.[[1]](https://halotherapysolutions.com/salt-room-in-the-box-salt-room-building/#:~:text=Salt%20Room%20Building%20Made%20Easy,licensing%20or%20certification%20is%20necessary.)[[2]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/multi-function-salt-therapy-space-ideas#:~:text=Selecting%20Space-Saving%20Salt%20Therapy,diverse%20therapeutic%20needs%20with%20ease.)[[3]](https://www.saltcavebuilder.com/massage-franchises-grow-with-salt-therapy-rooms#:~:text=Boosted%20Revenue%20per%20Square%20Foot%20%E2%80%93%20Unlike,clients%20at%20once%2C%20making%20it%20highly%20profitable.)[[4]](https://www.saltchamberinc.com/blog/what-is-a-salt-booth#:~:text=Many%20SALT%20Booths%C2%AE%20now%20incorporate%20additional%20therapeutic,benefits%20when%20combined%20with%20dry%20salt%20therapy.)[[5]](https://www.cryoinnovations.com/blog/2019/7/31/top-5-quality-spa-equipment-in-2019#:~:text=The%20top%205%20quality%20spa%20equipment%20choices,luxurious%20amenities%20that%20clients%20look%20forward%20to.)

[![HaloSauna | Halotherapy Solutions 3 Person](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161006-4353-0139-0000-fb5815bc8174:6)
HaloSauna | Halotherapy Solutions 3 Person $16,699.00 Shop Live Love Spa](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:997521900877852036,headlineOfferDocid:2883018925336664444,productDocid:2883018925336664444&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwilt7-b-6OTAxUQW0EAHfAYArUQgLcPegQIDBAC) A 4-in-1 unit that integrates halotherapy with infrared sauna, red light therapy, and chromotherapy.

[![HaloRED Legacy (Vitality Booth): Transform Your Recovery with Salt and Red Light Therapy, HaloRed 1-Person](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161006-4353-0139-0000-fb5815bc8174:7)
HaloRED Legacy (Vitality Booth): Transform Your Recovery with Salt and Red Light Therapy, HaloRed 1-Person $22,999.00 RecovAthlete](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:13819155933502566809,headlineOfferDocid:8656858476661967659,productDocid:8656858476661967659&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwilt7-b-6OTAxUQW0EAHfAYArUQgLcPegQIDBAL) Combines medical-grade red light therapy with halotherapy for enhanced recovery.

[![Atlas Flex-Block & Ion Salt Table by TouchAmerica Camel / Flex-Block](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161006-4353-0139-0000-fb5815bc8174:8)
Atlas Flex-Block & Ion Salt Table by TouchAmerica Camel / Flex-Block $15,890.00 Pure Spa Direct](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:12865283134943884178,headlineOfferDocid:4507216354270760718,productDocid:4507216354270760718&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwilt7-b-6OTAxUQW0EAHfAYArUQgLcPegQIDBAU) A treatment table by [TouchAmerica](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/atlas-flex-block-salt-table) with a solid Himalayan salt surface that can be used for massage or as a standalone relaxation bed.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15688858498582980868&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions:%20A%20Leader%20in,Courtesy%20of%20Halotherapy%20Solutions.)[[3]](https://recovathlete.com/collections/halotherapy-solutions)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4507216354270760718&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:7745139231842778863&ibp=oshop)[[6]](https://www.amtamassage.org/about/news/halotherapy/#:~:text=Integrating%20Halotherapy%20into%20Massage%20Practice%0A%0A%E2%80%9COne%20way%20to,massage%20session%20to%20enhance%20the%20therapeutic%20effects.%E2%80%9D)[[7]](https://chairsthatgive.com/products/touch-america-atlas-flex-block-halotherapy-salt-table#:~:text=TouchAmerica%20Atlas%20Flex-Block%E2%84%A2%20&%20ION%20Salt%20Table,350%20lbs.%20Static%20weight%20capacity%201000%20lbs.)[[8]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions:%20A%20Leader%20in,Courtesy%20of%20Halotherapy%20Solutions.)

Commercial Equipment Costs

Prices for professional equipment vary significantly based on capacity and integrated features.[[1]](https://www.mindbodyonline.com/business/education/comparison/10-best-spa-software-platforms#:~:text=Costs%20depend%20on%20included%20features%20and%20the,scheduling%2C%20which%20may%20work%20for%20smaller%20spas.)

| Equipment Type[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10680378767736738884&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:1280848658132765963&ibp=oshop)[[3]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:15688858498582980868&ibp=oshop)[[4]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:4507216354270760718&ibp=oshop)[[5]](https://saltyturtlewellness.com/halotherapy-dry-salt/#:~:text=Absolutely!%20You're%20welcome%20to%20bring%20a%20friend,a%20maximum%20of%202%20people%20for%20comfort.) | Typical Professional Price |
|---|---|
| **Halogenerator (Stand-alone)** | $5,000 – $7,500 |
| **HaloSTAR Booth (1-3 Person)** | $9,900 – $11,200 |
| **[HaloIR / HaloSauna](https://www.google.com/search?ibp=oshop&prds=pvt:hg,pvo:29,imageDocid:10429495114561271530,headlineOfferDocid:15688858498582980868,productDocid:15688858498582980868&q=product&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwilt7-b-6OTAxUQW0EAHfAYArUQxa4PegQIDxAE) (2 Person)** | $12,900 – $15,500 |
| **Professional Salt Table** | ~$15,890 |

- **HaloPod Mini** : A portable, compact salt room solution designed for flexibility in smaller wellness spaces.[[1]](https://www.google.com/search?q=product&prds=pvt:hg,productid:10694323843935424057&ibp=oshop)[[2]](https://emag.medicalexpo.com/halotherapy-modern-wellness-solutions-with-ancient-roots/#:~:text=Halotherapy%20Solutions:%20A%20Leader%20in,Courtesy%20of%20Halotherapy%20Solutions.)[[3]](https://recovathlete.com/collections/halotherapy-solutions)[[4]](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/halostar-halotherapy-booth#:~:text=Bring%20the%20benefits%20of%20halotherapy,halogenerator%E2%80%94optimized%20for%20the%20HaloSTAR.)[[5]](https://www.universalcompanies.com/products/halostar-halotherapy-booth)
